title: Review scheduler telemetry integration
description: Review the scheduler telemetry integration for correctness, proper error isolation (telemetry failures must not affect bead outcomes), history capping logic, env var parsing, and consistency with the two-tier storage design.
acceptance_criteria: Telemetry write failures properly isolated from bead outcome
History capping logic correct (prune oldest after append)
Env var parsing handles edge cases (missing, zero, negative, non-numeric)
Telemetry captured for all outcome paths in _finalize()
No performance regression from telemetry writes
